identity.name: GameCraft EDU
identity.vibe: Professional yet Playful, Trustworthy, Creative, Kinetic
identity.theme_logic: Light Mode for Marketplace/Dashboard (Readability), Dark Mode for Game Studio/Play (Immersion). User toggle available.

rules: Headings must use 'Outfit' with tight tracking.
Body text must use 'Manrope' for maximum legibility.
Interactive elements (buttons, tabs) should use uppercase labels with wide tracking for clarity.

primary.name: Creative Violet
primary.usage: Primary Actions, Brand Moments, Active States

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5 active:translate-y-0
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:border-primary/50 hover:text-primary transition-colors

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300
cards.glass: bg-white/70 dark:bg-slate-900/70 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-2xl

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all bg-slate-50/50

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use generic 'Inter' font. Import 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts immediately.
Implement a 'Bento Grid' for the Dashboard homepage (mix of 1x1, 2x1, and 2x2 cards).
The 'Game Studio' page must use a Dark Theme by default to reduce eye strain during creation.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (success/error states).
For the Marketplace, use a 'Masonry' layout for game cards to accommodate different aspect ratios.
Ensure all buttons have a subtle 'pop' animation on click (scale-95).
Use the 'Creative Violet' (#7c3aed) as the primary brand color, but use it sparingly for high-impact actions.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements for testing.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text meets WCAG AA standards. Use slate-600 or darker on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-primary on all interactive elements.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for all animations.

universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky headers and overlays.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 for icons. Use Lucide React icons.
